feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria within 15 km east of the main divide. Freezing level about 3000 metres. Note, another period of heavy rain is expected from Friday afternoon. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward making period longer.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain. Rainfall amounts may approach warning criteria within 15 km east of the main divide. Freezing level about 3000 metres. Note, another period of heavy rain is expected from Friday afternoon. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward making period longer.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 200 to 300 mm of rain about the ranges, and lesser amounts near the coast. The largest accumulations are likely about and south of the glaciers, where some models indicate 350 mm is possible about the ranges. Peak rates of 20 to 30 mm/h expected during Thursday. Note, another period of heavy rain is expected from Friday afternoon. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Minimal. Changes: Timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward making period longer. Rainfall totals increased.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and amounts may approach warning criteria. Note, another period of heavy rain is expected from Friday afternoon. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward making period longer.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
